Records.description: Ice-cream cone family, ice-cone_L6_equal-mass-internal. Banana graph capped by a triangle, L loops, equal internal masses (all L+2 edges mass m). 3-point function: massless p1, p2 at the banana endpoints, off-shell q = p1+p2 at the apex; depends on the single scale q^2/m^2 (arXiv:2212.09550). The apex leg carries the off-shell scale: configs with an all-massless apex are the q^2 = 0 specialization, not family members (plan v1.2 finding B1). L = 1 is the equal-mass triangle with off-shell apex (library config e12_e2_e_/011_01_2_). In 2d the ice cone shares the same Calabi-Yau periods as the banana, two copies; an all-L master basis is known.
